content: fact-only remains the always-applied hard gate and owns allowed fact sources, ambiguity handling, Evidence Labels, Interview Decision Gate use, and reporting boundaries.
agent-rule explicitly applies fact-only and does not independently redefine the allowed fact-source list or generic no-assumption hard stop.

agent-rule retains critical thinking, engineering principles, lifecycle, intent confirmation, change safety, runtime restart safety, frontend verification, security boundary, and Agent Factory state-model rules.
both skill names, directories, implicit invocation policies, and the Interview Decision Gate path remain unchanged.
active routing and metadata descriptions match the clarified ownership.
no historical artifact or unrelated product file is rewritten.
a focused regression test encodes the responsibility boundary
the focused test fails before implementation and passes afterward
skill metadata tests and quick skill validation pass
active-reference search and git diff checks pass
AI review evidence and Human review material are recorded
